description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND TBS broadcasters are assigned
AND the user's location is International non-Canada
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the game level blackedOutVideo = false
AND the AWAY (National) feed level tbsAuthRequired = true
AND the HOME (International) feed level tbsAuthRequired = false

steps.action: WHEN the user views a TBS Postseason game tile
steps.result: THEN the MVPD pill does not display in the lower left corner of the game tile
